title: Delicious Dutch Beet Salad
description: A sour, crunchy salad that evokes Dutch nostalgia with boiled beets, tangy lemon-mustard dressing, toasted walnuts, and optional feta.
instructions: Place the beets in a large pot and cover with cold water; bring to a boil and simmer until tender, about 45 minutes.
Drain the beets and let them cool until they can be handled; slice into bite-sized wedges and set aside.
In a small bowl whisk together the lemon zest, juice, olive oil, mustard, honey, salt, and pepper until the mixture is smooth and slightly thickened.
Toss the beet wedges with the dressing in a large bowl and stir to coat evenly.
Sprinkle the toasted walnuts, crumbled feta, and chopped parsley over the salad and gently mix.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed.
Serve the salad chilled or at room temperature, optionally accompanied by crusty rye bread.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
